mapper.select: SELECT d.*, u.USER_NAME as last_chg_name, o.ORG_NAME FROM admin_sm_duty d LEFT JOIN admin_sm_user u ON u.USER_ID = d.LAST_CHG_USR LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org o ON o.ORG_ID = d.ORG_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select T1.duty_code as dutyId, T1.duty_name ,T1.org_id as orgId from admin_sm_duty T1 ${ew.customSqlSegment}
select T3.DUTY_CODE from admin_sm_duty T3, admin_sm_user_duty_rel T2, admin_sm_user T1 where T3.duty_id = T2.duty_id and T2.user_id = T1.user_id and T1.login_code = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT T0.DUTY_ID,T0.DUTY_CODE,T0.DUTY_NAME,T0.ORG_ID,T0.DUTY_STS,T0.LAST_CHG_USR,T0.LAST_CHG_DT,T1.ORG_NAME FROM admin_sm_duty T0 LEFT JOIN admin_sm_org T1 ON T0.ORG_ID=T1.ORG_ID ${ew.customSqlSegment}
